title: Data Scientist
content: A Data Scientist analyzes and interprets complex data. Required skills include Python, Machine Learning, SQL. Salary range in India is ₹8,00,000 to ₹20,00,000. Excellent career growth to Lead Data Scientist.

title: Software Engineer
content: Software Engineers design and build applications. Skills needed: Java, Python, C++, React. Good work-life balance depending on the company. Typical salaries are ₹6,00,000 to ₹15,00,000.
